name: tooltip
description: A hover/focus-triggered floating description panel. WAI-ARIA APG Tooltip pattern: bubble carries role="tooltip" + a stable id; tooltip.enhancer.ts wires aria-describedby on the first focusable descendant at mount (or the wrapper span when no focusable descendant exists) and removes it on destroy. Show/hide timing: hover delay (configurable, default 600ms) + immediate focus, Escape-while-visible dismiss (document-level capture listener, registered only while open), hover persistence (pointer entering the bubble cancels the hide timer). Native popover="manual" + CSS Anchor Positioning for positioning -- the shared popover seam. No round-trip: open state is ephemeral, fires no wire actions. Four variants (default/info/warning/destructive) map to the shared intent token pairs. CSS-only arrow (lv-tooltip__arrow pseudo-element). CSP-clean, no inline handlers, no eval.
docs: Copies the tooltip partial to your JTE root at lievit/tooltip.jte. Requires tooltip.enhancer.ts registered in your runtime (installTooltip(runtime)). Call as @template.lievit.tooltip(id="save-tip", content="Save document", trigger=@`<button>Save</button>`). id is REQUIRED and must be unique per page (it becomes the bubble's id and the aria-describedby value). The enhancer wires aria-describedby at mount -- do NOT set it in the trigger slot markup. variant selects the intent tone (default/info/warning/destructive). placement (default "top") sets the CSS Anchor Positioning preferred side; falls back via position-try-fallbacks. delay (default 600ms) is the hover show-delay; focus always shows immediately. Set delay=0 for icon-only buttons where the tooltip IS the label. hideDelay (default 0) allows the pointer to traverse into the bubble. Set arrow=false to suppress the directional pointer. disabled=true makes the enhancer no-op all events. attrs is TRUSTED raw ($unsafe) for STATIC author-typed attribute strings only -- never interpolate DB-derived values. The --lv-z-tooltip: 950 token is NET-NEW; add it to your lievit-tokens.css :root and .dark blocks.
